title: Stonepass Spire — Floor 1
summary: A compact fantasy proof world: an ogre blocks the bridge, choices branch, and one path leads toward a hidden cave.

storyBeats.title: The Blocked Bridge
storyBeats.description: An ogre blocks the only bridge into Stonepass Valley.

consequences.summary: You defeat the ogre in a fierce struggle. The bridge clears, but the battle shakes the valley slopes.
visibleChanges: The ogre collapses and the bridge is passable.
Rocks tumble from the cliffs, revealing a hidden cave mouth.

consequences.summary: You trick the ogre into leaving the bridge unattended.
You offer food and the ogre grudgingly allows passage.
You talk to the ogre and learn why the bridge is blocked.
You sneak past the ogre while it is distracted.
You emerge from the cave as ancient power stirs in the valley.

npcs.name: Bridge Ogre
npcs.description: A hulking ogre guarding the only bridge into Stonepass Valley.

npcs.name: Elder Mara
npcs.description: The village elder who watches over Stonepass from the town square.

temporaryInstances.title: The Hidden Cave
temporaryInstances.description: A unstable cave exposed by the landslide beneath Stonepass Bridge.
temporaryInstances.entranceText: Cold air spills from a jagged opening in the cliff. Loose stones still skitter down the slope.

rooms.title: Cave Mouth
rooms.description: Mud and broken roots line the narrow entrance.

rooms.title: Fallen Rocks
rooms.description: A pile of boulders blocks the path deeper into the cave.

rooms.title: Dragon Chamber
rooms.description: A vast chamber opens ahead. Something ancient stirs in the dark.
